defaultLanguageDesc: Select default language for the widget
description: Create and configure embeddable widgets for your projects
embedCodeDesc: Copy this code and paste it on your website
linksDesc: Use these links to access the widgets directly
settingsDesc: Select project and configure widget parameters
title: Widgets
widgetScriptDesc: Main JavaScript file for the widget
showFullProjectDesc: Show full apartment chessboard with filters inside the widget block.

atLeastOneOptionRequired: You must enable at least one option: show project or floating button.
